creator: anarcat@anarcat.ath.cx
text:
Hi,

The patch seems okay, but I feel I can't review it properly because
there's a lot of whitespace changes (e.g. changing the path from
ledger-smb to ledgermb) alongside critical changes (upgrade from 1.1.x
to 1.2.x).

So I do not want to block that change but I feel I can't give my thumbs
up either because the patch is too hard to review just like this...

Could you break it down in smaller pieces?

A.

-- 
In god we trust, others pay cash.
                        - Richard Desjardins, Miami
